Grieving. My Godfather lost his battle to cancer the morning of valentines day. An angel of a man. Soft spoken. Incredibly sincere. Always thought of other people. Knew how to make you feel heard and seen. Only 63 years. Its unfair. I am devastated and heartbroken. 

Still. 

I haven’t been in the same room as both my parents in 16 years. Can’t remember the last time I saw them smile together since the divorce. (Can you read my mom’s lips in the video? lol)

I got to see my little Godbrother as a man now. My family all together again satisfied something deep in my soul. My Godfather would’ve loved that. Laughter. Memories. Prayer. More grief. Church. The smell of my moms collard greens filling the house. Soft snowfall out the window. More grief. Tears. The squeeze of a hand. A head on a shoulder. A hybrid strain named chicken and waffles. Thats So Raven. A dry cough. The sound of a fork on a plate. Different flavors of pain. And still more grief.

Incandescence is the emission of light (visible electromagnetic radiation) from a hot body due to its high temperature. It occurs when thermal energy causes atoms to vibrate and release photons, with hotter objects appearing red, then orange, yellow, and finally white. 

Lava flows are rivers of incandescent of molten rock or lava moving downslope or away from an eruption vent.

Daily Pearl:

Inducible Laryngeal Obstruction (ILO), also known as Vocal Cord Dysfunction (VCD) or Paradoxical Vocal Fold Motion (PVFM), is a functional disorder characterized by the involuntary, paradoxical adduction (closing) of the vocal cords during inspiration, leading to acute upper airway obstruction. 

It is a key mimic of asthma and anaphylaxis, often presenting with acute dyspnea, chest tightness, and inspiratory stridor.

Acute Dyspnea + Crackles

A 28-year-old woman presents with syncope during exercise. ECG shows deep T-wave inversions in V4–V6. Echo shows asymmetric septal hypertrophy (septum 22 mm). Which mechanism most directly explains her syncope?

A. Fixed LVOT obstruction
B. Dynamic LVOT obstruction due to systolic anterior motion
C. Ventricular septal rupture
D. Aortic regurgitation
E. Mitral stenosis

B correct 
HCM → asymmetric septal hypertrophy.
During exercise ↓ preload → septum + anterior mitral leaflet move together → dynamic LVOT obstruction → ↓ cardiac output → syncope.

Others wrong:

A Fixed obstruction – HCM is dynamic 

C Septal rupture – post-MI 

D Aortic regurgitation – volume overload 

E Mitral stenosis – dyspnea/AF, not this picture

Laughing so hard you can’t breathe happens because your body forces out rapid, repeated bursts of air, which can briefly limit how much oxygen you’re taking in. This temporary shortness of breath is sometimes called functional dyspnea. During intense laughter, lung volume can drop, airways may tighten slightly, and it can even lead to coughing, wheezing, or in rare situations, feeling lightheaded or close to fainting — a reaction known as laughter-induced syncope.

Case Record of the Massachusetts General Hospital (@massgeneral): A 91-year-old man was admitted to the hospital with weight loss, dyspnea, and eosinophilia. An anteroposterior chest radiograph obtained 2 months earlier showed bibasilar patchy opacities. A diagnosis was made. Full case details: https://nej.md/463iKqj

When knees collapse inward during a squat or landing, that’s dynamic valgus.
It’s not “just bad form.” It’s usually:
• Weak glute medius
• Poor hip external rotation control
• Delayed neuromuscular timing
• Fatigue
Biomechanically, knee valgus increases torque at the joint.
Longer lever arm from hip instability = more stress at the knee.
Translation: Your hip controls your knee.

Control upstream. Protect downstream.

Fear before growth feels identical to fear before danger. Your body doesn’t know the difference.

I stopped asking, “How do I calm this?” I started asking, “How can I transform this?”

Emotion is fuel. Direction determines destiny.

5. Self-Compassion Is Strength:
�I believed being hard on myself would fix me.

It didn’t. It buried me.

Compassion doesn’t mean weakness. It means inclusion. You stop abandoning yourself when it’s inconvenient.

If you can sit with your own pain without judgment, you become unshakeable.

The hug you’re waiting for is your own awareness 👐.

Canine Distemper is a highly contagious viral disease that mainly affects puppies and unvaccinated dogs. It damages the respiratory, gastrointestinal, and nervous systems.
Common Signs:
• Fever
• Eye and nasal discharge
• Coughing
• Vomiting and diarrhea
• Loss of appetite
• Weakness
• Neurological signs (muscle twitching, seizures)
It can be life-threatening, but timely vaccination is the best prevention.

“No, more like—“
“Oh, like rabies?”

sends a ripple of unease through you. The measles virus is attacking the cells that line her lungs and suppressing her immune system, rendering her vulnerable to secondary infections. You step away to feed the baby and put him in clean clothes, but then rush back when you hear her calling you in a strained, croaking voice, her vocal cords swollen and thick with mucus. You find her lying in bed with her hand over her eyelids and tear

tracks on her temples. She asks you to close the curtains because the sunlight is hurting her eyes—the virus has triggered a case of conjunctivitis. In all of the colds you’ve nursed her through, she has never complained of pain triggered by light. When you rouse her to give her Tylenol, you see that the whites of her eyes are reddened, and the bases of her eyelashes sticky. You carefully clean her eye area with a damp paper towel, kiss her nose, then leave her to sleep it off.

Nakibahagi sa umiinit na diskusyon sa pagitan nina Sen. Robin Padilla at Ronald Llamas si dating Comelec at COA Commissioner Atty. Rowena Guanzon, matapos maglabas ng pabiro ngunit matalim na komento sa social media.

Sa isang Facebook post, iminungkahi ni Guanzon na gawing pormal na laban ang sigalot ng dalawa sa pamamagitan ng pagtakbo sa eleksyon.

Ayon sa kanya:

“Bat di niyo nalang ilaban si Llamas na Vice President kay Robin Padilla.”

Dagdag pa niya:

“Ang partida ko, hindi na mangangampanya si Robin 
at may plus 5M na boto agad si Llamas.
Binoy vs Abnoy.”

Ang pahayag ni Guanzon ay kaugnay ng mainit na palitan ng salita nina Padilla at Llamas matapos batikusin ng huli ang pagiging bukas ng senador sa posibilidad na tumakbong bise presidente kung hihilingin ng dating Pangulong Rodrigo Duterte.

Iniuugnay ito sa maagang usapin ng 2028 elections, lalo na’t hayagan nang nagpahayag ng intensyong tumakbo sa pagkapangulo si VP Sara Duterte.

Nung abot hanggang tenga na yung tubig, bigla niya akong binitawan, kaya bigla akong lumubog. For context, 4’11” ako at siya ay 5’11” ang height, plus, hindi ako marunong lumangoy or magfloating. Nagpupumiglas ako at nakainom na rin ng tubig, kaya inangkas niya ako sa likod niya. Akala ko ibabalik na niya ako sa gilid ng pool, pero hindi pa man ako nakakarecover para huminga sa pagkakalubog ko, inihagis niya ulit ako sa malalim na parte ng pool. Dahil mas malalim, di ko abot sahig ng pool.

Kahit nandun mga kateam niya, umiyak ako ng umiyak at nagsisigaw kasi nahihirapan ako huminga, at bukod pa dun ay takot ako sa tubig na malalim kaya nilapitan niya ako. Pagkabalik ko sa gilid ng pool ay nanginginig ako sa takot, kaya kinuhanan ako ng kateam niya ng tubig at tinanong ako kung okay lang ba ako at pinagsabihan siya na wag ginagawang biro yung ginawa niya sakin. Habang nanginginig pa rin ako sa takot, bigla niyang sa mga kateam niya, “Pabayaan niyo, di naman totoo yan”, sabay tawa.
May kaparehas bako dito na nahihirapan huminga pag nakakakita ng mga powderized, pulbos, or yung mga pinong pino like harina, alikabok, o ano basta mga ganun ba. Feeling ko ako lang 😪.

ever since tumambay ako dito sa threads mas naging conscious na ako sa mga kinakain ko at andami kong natututunan about foods. pero minsan confusing parin lalo na sa pagbasa ng label ng foods ano pa dapat bigyan pansin if magbabasa ng label?

Hi po! always check & compare between macro content of prodcuts. if you want to lessen your bad fats, avoid saturated fats. Always check rin sa %RENI/%DV sa right column. If <5% siya it has a low content that can contribute to your diet. Habang >20% is high content. So if may nakita kang ex: sodium na beyond 20%, high content na siya that can increase your risk sa high BP. Pero if for example yung iron/fiber or protein ang >20%, yun yung ideal.

Paikot nyo po ang tape measure around your waist, over your belly botton..Don't suck in your stomach. Sabi ng mga eksperto, 35" for women and 40" for men are signs of excess visceral or belly fat.

Excess fats po ang istorbo sa natural na sistema ng ating katawan kaya merong heart attack, diabetes, hypertension, cancer, at iba pang health related problems..

PM nyo po sa akin ang inyong age, height at weight to calculate your BMI..Be healthy!😃

Pakunswelo nalang yun sa magulang mo eh 🥲 
hindi madali mag alaga ng mga bata ah, lalo yan maliliit pa need talaga ng atensyon at pag aalaga. Kaya pagod din magulang mo for sure. Sakit sa dibdib pag ganyan makita mo partner mo wala man lang konsiderasyon. Try niya kamo kuhanan sila ng magbabantay kulang pa yang 10k

ever since tumambay ako dito sa threads mas naging conscious na ako sa mga kinakain ko at andami kong natututunan about foods. pero minsan confusing parin lalo na sa pagbasa ng label ng foods ano pa dapat bigyan pansin if magbabasa ng label?

Hi po! always check & compare between macro content of prodcuts. if you want to lessen your bad fats, avoid saturated fats. Always check rin sa %RENI/%DV sa right column. If <5% siya it has a low content that can contribute to your diet. Habang >20% is high content. So if may nakita kang ex: sodium na beyond 20%, high content na siya that can increase your risk sa high BP. Pero if for example yung iron/fiber or protein ang >20%, yun yung ideal.

Giving you guys proof that just changing little things about ur diet & doing bare minimum activities can make a huge difference already. Comparing my APE results from last yr & this yr. I intentionally dont compute what I eat, I estimate. I focused on my relationship with food and change small things like our rice to black rice. More vegetables. 1/2 rice. Daming sidequests na di consistent😅, like gym, running, golf, hiking. Normal naman even last yr except sa OGTT hehe but grabe parin progress🤍

When I say bare minimum activities as in, minimal walking lang, di ko binibilang steps. Minsan kung kelan may gana mag ggym. Mostly for fun ako nag eexercise, pag may nagaaya mag hiking ganun. I still eat sweets or chocolates and have a stash of snacks by my desk pag nag wowork.

Kaya di kailangan talaga sobrang strict at isiping wala ka ng kakainin. As long as you know your moderation, aware ka sa mga kinakain mo, and may variety parin, big step na yun.

I used to have smooth and soft skin. Even getting praises sa mga friends and acquaintances na nindot daw kig panit (makita raman siguro sa ubang posts nako) and they often ask unsa akong ginagamit.
